banana bread: Ingredients: 3 ripe bananas, 1/3 cup melted butter, 3/4 cup sugar, 1 egg, 1 tsp vanilla, 1 tsp baking soda, pinch of salt, 1 1/2 cups flour. Mix wet ingredients, fold in dry, bake at 350F for 50-60 minutes.
chocolate chip cookies: Ingredients: 1 cup butter, 3/4 cup sugar, 3/4 cup brown sugar, 2 eggs, 2 tsp vanilla, 2 1/4 cups flour, 1 tsp baking soda, 1/2 tsp salt, 2 cups chocolate chips. Scoop and bake at 375F for 9-11 minutes.
fettuccine alfredo: Cook fettuccine until al dente. In a pan melt 1/2 cup butter, add 1 cup heavy cream, simmer, then whisk in 1 cup grated parmesan. Season with salt/pepper and toss pasta in sauce.
mac and cheese: Boil macaroni. Make sauce with 2 tbsp butter + 2 tbsp flour, whisk in 2 cups milk, then melt in 2 cups shredded cheddar. Season, combine with pasta, and bake at 375F for 20 minutes if desired.
pumpkin pie: Mix 15 oz pumpkin puree, 3/4 cup sugar, 2 eggs, 1 cup evaporated milk, 1 tsp cinnamon, 1/2 tsp ginger, 1/4 tsp cloves, pinch salt. Pour into pie crust and bake at 425F for 15 min, then 350F for 35-40 min.
tres leches cake: Bake a vanilla sponge cake. Poke holes, then soak with 1 can evaporated milk + 1 can condensed milk + 1 cup whole milk. Chill, top with whipped cream, and dust with cinnamon.
